prompts.name: rcf_execute_build_cycle
prompts.description: How to execute the RCF 5-stage build cycle well: per-stage guidance, referee commands, failure modes, escalation rules. Fetch once per session, then drive rcf build --next.

prompts.name: rcf_elicit_requirements
prompts.description: How to draw a valid RCF tree out of a conversation: question frames for PRD / REQ / US / AC, the testable-AC quality bar, TAC / ADR capture, FBS queue construction, and when to stop.
